mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (mno, board, title, content) VALUES (#{mno}, #{board}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts
hidden = 0 AND board = #{board}

SELECT p.*, m.name AS author, m.email AS author_email, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = p.bno) AS comment_count, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.bno = p.bno AND pl.mno = #{mno}) AS liked FROM posts p JOIN members m ON m.mno = p.mno WHERE p.bno = #{bno}

SELECT p.*, m.name AS author, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = p.bno) AS comment_count FROM posts p JOIN members m ON m.mno = p.mno WHERE p.created_at >= CURDATE() AND p.hidden = 0 ORDER BY p.likes DESC, p.bno DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT p.*, m.name AS author, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = p.bno) AS comment_count FROM posts p JOIN members m ON m.mno = p.mno ORDER BY p.bno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET hidden = #{hidden} WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.name AS author, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.bno = p.bno) AS comment_count FROM posts p JOIN members m ON m.mno = p.mno WHERE p.mno = #{mno} AND p.hidden = 0 ORDER BY p.bno DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE mno = #{mno} AND bno = #{bno}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE mno = #{mno} AND bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET likes = GREATEST(likes + #{delta}, 0) WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT likes FROM posts WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (bno, mno, content) VALUES (#{bno}, #{mno}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.name AS author, m.email AS author_email FROM comments c JOIN members m ON m.mno = c.mno WHERE c.bno = #{bno} ORDER BY c.cno
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content} WHERE cno = #{cno}
